title: Wave-2 🔴: scan/[id] lifecycle (seeded RUNNING/TIMEOUT/COMPLETED) + 1 real submission + axe
acceptance_criteria: Lifecycle states use ONLY pre-seeded Scan/Finding/ScanEvent rows (db-seed.ts seedScanLifecycle, T-05) and NEVER call /api/v1/scans: RUNNING (progress UI from ScanEvent rows), TIMEOUT (status TIMEOUT + partial findings rendered), COMPLETED (full result). Assert the polling/progress UI for RUNNING reaches a stable assertion without awaiting a real terminal state.

Exactly ONE real /api/v1/scans submission spec: asserts the POST is made (page.waitForRequest set up BEFORE submit) and navigation/redirect occurs — it MUST NOT await scan completion or any terminal state (keeps it off the 120s timeout; mirrors the existing non-hermetic landing pattern but does not duplicate landing.spec.ts).
scan.a11y.spec.ts (R3): axe on the scan/[id] view post-stable-state, scoped, WCAG A+AA, @functional, logged allow-list.
Single-tagged per qa-checklist.md; self-contained seed + afterAll cleanup; npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of why lifecycle is seeded-only and the real-scan spec asserts submission-only
